data.body:
## Description

Write failing tests that verify the presence and structure of Prohibited Fix Patterns sections in both target files. These tests must fail (RED) before implementation begins.

**File 1: Create** `tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py`
- Test class verifying SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md contains a Prohibited Fix Patterns section
- Tests for each of the 5 anti-patterns: (1) skipping/removing tests, (2) loosening assertions, (3) broad exception handlers, (4) downgrading error severity, (5) commenting out failing code
- Each anti-pattern test verifies: pattern name present, code example present, rationale present, 'Do this instead' alternative present
- Tests read the file and verify sections exist — structural tests appropriate for prompt templates (metadata/schema validation category)

**File 2: Modify** `tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py`
- Add a new test class `TestTaskExecutionProhibitedFixPatterns`
- Tests for the same 5 anti-patterns with same verification structure
- Must not disturb existing test classes

**TDD requirement**: Both test sets must FAIL when run before Tasks 2 and 3 implement the sections.

**RED markers**: Add .test-index entries with RED markers:
- `plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md: tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py [TestSubAgentBoundariesAntiCoverup]`
- Update existing entry for task-execution.md to add RED marker for new test class

### Files to modify
- CREATE: tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py
- MODIFY: tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py
- [ ] Test file contains at least 5 test methods (one per anti-pattern)
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] task-execution template test file contains TestTaskExecutionProhibitedFixPatterns class
  Verify: grep -q 'class TestTaskExecutionProhibitedFixPatterns' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- [ ] .test-index entry exists for SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md
  Verify: grep -q 'SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] All new tests FAIL (RED) against current files (before implementation)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py --tb=no -q 2>&1 | grep -q 'failed'
